meta.title: Watch ULA launch their Vulcan rocket for the first time ever! #Vulcan
meta.description:
This is the first launch for ULA's new Vulcan rocket and will also be the first flight of Blue Origin's BE-4 engines. The payload is the Peregrine lunar lander, built by Pittsburgh based company Astrobotic, targeting a landing at Gruithuisen Domes on February 23, 2024. 

For more info, check out our Prelaunch Preview! - https://everydayastronaut.com/vulcan-vc2s-peregrine-lunar-lander-maiden-flight/

Tickets are on sale now to see some of your favorite space people LIVE in person, January 13/14 in Austin TX! We're giving out Astro Awards to missions & you can come! 
https://www.astroawards2024.com

00:00 - Intro
03:25 - Prelaunch Preview
14:20 - Q&A / ULA Stream
39:00 - Go / No-Go Poll
47:40 - Liftoff!
52:50 - Stage Separation
1:03:50 - Upper Stage Cutoff
1:05:30 - Q&A
1:29:40 - Upper Stage Ignition 2
1:38:10 - Peregrine Deploy
2:06:20 - Upper Stage Ignition 3

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel and subreddit! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music
